  • Uses of GameView in edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.rewards

    Methods in edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.rewards with parameters of type GameView
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    abstract double
    RewardFunction.getFullTransitionReward(GameView state, ACTION_TYPE action, GameView nextState)
    A method to calculate the reward as a function of the game you were in, the action selected in that state, and how that action resolved R(s,a,s').
    abstract double
    RewardFunction.getHalfTransitionReward(GameView state, ACTION_TYPE action)
    A method to calculate the reward only as a function of the current state of the game and action chosen R(s,a).
    abstract double
    RewardFunction.getStateReward(GameView state)
    A method to calculate the reward only as a function of the current state of the game R(s).

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    ActionSensorArray.getSensorValues(GameView state, int actionCounter, Action action)
    Converts the provided Action into a feature vector.
    abstract edu.bu.jmat.Matrix
    PlacementSensorArray.getSensorValues(GameView state, int numRemainingArmies, Territory territory)
    Converts the provided Territory into a feature vector.
    abstract edu.bu.jmat.Matrix
    StateSensorArray.getSensorValues(GameView state)
    Converts the provided GameView into a feature vector.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    RiskAnimationListener.onActionApplied(GameView gameView, int agentIdx, Action action, boolean success)
    Called after any action is applied (attack, fortify, redeem, no-op).
    void
    RiskAnimationListener.onArmyPlaced(GameView gameView, int agentIdx, Territory territory)
    Called each time an army is placed during setup.
    void
    RiskAnimationListener.onGameEnd(GameView gameView)
    Called when the game ends.
    void
    RiskAnimationListener.onSetupComplete(GameView gameView)
    Called when Game.setup() completes.
    void
    RiskAnimationListener.onSetupStart(GameView gameView)
    Called when Game.setup() begins.
    void
    RiskAnimationListener.onTurnEnd(GameView gameView, int agentIdx)
    Called when a turn ends.
    void
    RiskAnimationListener.onTurnStart(GameView gameView, int agentIdx)
    Called at the start of each agent's turn.
    void
    RiskPanel.setGame(GameView view)
    Sets the game view to render.
    void
    InfoPanel.update(GameView game, int currentAgentIdx, String status)
    Updates the info panel with the current game state.
